sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِهِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Ahmed stiže u svoju kancelariju u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed arrives at his office at eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ رَسَائِلَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ وَيُرَتِّبُ مَهَامَّهُ.
sentences.translation: Čita e-mailove i organizuje svoje zadatke.
sentences.translationEn: He reads emails and organizes his tasks.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ فِي وَقْتِ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu sa svojim prijateljima tokom pauze.
sentences.translationEn: He drinks coffee with his friends during the break.
